title: A Multi-Center Study of MYOBLOC for the Treatment of Sialorrhea in Parkinson's Disease Patients
text:
Summary: To determine safety, tolerability and preliminary efficacy of intraglandular injections of MYOBLOC for the treatment of sialorrhea in Parkinsons' Disease patients
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 Parkinsons' Disease patients with Sialorrhea for at least 3 months 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 Patients with non-idiopathic PD parkinsonism 

 Patients previously exposed to botulinum toxins 

 Patients with a history of aspiration pneumonia, moderate/severe choking and/or moderate/severe dysphagia 

 Patients with prior salivary gland surgery

metadata.brief_title: A Multi-Center Study of MYOBLOC for the Treatment of Sialorrhea in Parkinson's Disease Patients
metadata.drugs: ['Botulinum Toxin Type B (Myobloc)', 'Matched placebo to Myobloc']
